ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product type is intended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active in the catalog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that defines the size */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "body_length" TEXT /* Body length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  "rise" TEXT /* Rise measurement (for pants) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the order belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the order belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "pref_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "pref_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
